query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE bad_debt END) AS total_paid,
  SUM(principal) AS sum_principal,
  SUM(interest) AS sum_interest,
  SUM(fee) AS sum_fee,
  SUM(penalty) AS sum_penalty,
  SUM(unlock_fee) AS sum_unlock_fee,
  SUM(overpaid) AS sum_overpaid
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND approve_date IS NULL;
